_description: Plain Tailwind CSS with no component library. HTML elements styled with Tailwind utility classes. No CVA, no shadcn/ui, no Radix primitives.

tailwind.colorTokens: slate, gray, zinc, neutral, stone, red, orange, amber, yellow, lime, green, emerald, teal, cyan, sky, blue, indigo, violet, purple, fuchsia, pink, rose

patterns.spacing: Container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8. Sections: py-12 sm:py-16 lg:py-24. Stack spacing via space-y-4 / space-y-6 or flex gap-4 / gap-6.
patterns.typography: Tailwind type scale. Headings: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight. Body: text-base text-gray-600. Lead text: text-lg text-gray-500. Apply responsive prefixes throughout.
conventions: No component library — compose from HTML elements + Tailwind utilities
Use clsx() for conditional className composition
Mobile-first responsive: base styles, then sm: md: lg: xl: overrides
Interactive states: hover: focus: active: disabled: variants
Dark mode via dark: variant when enabled in tailwind.config
